entities.name: MARARA DISTRICT
entities.description: A risk-prone farming area where goat restocking and pass-on approaches are implemented

entities.name: GOAT
entities.description: A profitable and resilient source of income for farmers

entities.name: GOAT RESTOCKING AND PASS-ON
entities.description: An approach of providing goats to extremely poor farmers who then pass on the first offspring to other farmers

entities.name: LOCAL DEVELOPMENT PATHWAYS
entities.description: Development routes that farmers can participate in through the practice of goat farming

entities.name: GOAT FARMING
entities.description: The practice of raising goats to generate income and build resilience

entities.name: SMALLHOLDER FARMERS
entities.description: Vulnerable farmers who benefit from goat farming and restocking to improve their livelihoods

entities.name: LIVELIHOOD
entities.description: The means of securing basic needs, which is improved for smallholder farmers through the sale of goats

entities.name: DROUGHT
entities.description: An environmental threat that communities respond to by building assets and knowledge through restocking

entities.name: THEFT
entities.description: A security threat that communities respond to by building assets and knowledge through restocking

entities.name: STAKEHOLDER NETWORKS
entities.description: Networks that bring goat market partners closer for more cost-effective transactions

entities.name: GOAT MARKET PARTNERS
entities.description: Entities involved in the collection, sale, and purchase of goats
